sdks.name: @hojai/foundation
sdks.description: HOJAI Foundation SDK — unified client for CorpID, MemoryOS, TwinOS, SADA Trust, Flow Orchestrator, and PolicyOS. Routes through the RTMN Hub (http://localhost:4399).

sdks.name: @hojai/cli
sdks.description: The HOJAI command-line tool (npx hojai). Manage config, search the marketplace, capture memories, compose LLM context, generate AI-native specs, deploy projects, add agents + integrations — all from your terminal.

sdks.name: @hojai/ai-spec
sdks.description: AI-native spec for HOJAI projects — defines the schema for hojai.ai.md + .hojai/manifest.json + .hojai/capability.json so AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) can understand HOJAI projects.

sdks.name: @hojai/agentos
sdks.description: AgentOS SDK — TypeScript client for HOJAI Agent Operating System. Manage AI employee lifecycle: create, deploy, pause, resume, heartbeat, version snapshots, and capability-based search across the AgentOS platform (agent-registry + agent-orc

sdks.name: @hojai/bizora
sdks.description: Bizora SDK - Client for the Bizora Reports Dashboard (port 4874). Dashboards, widgets, async report generation in pdf/csv/xlsx/json.

sdks.name: @hojai/cloud
sdks.description: Cloud SDK - Client for the HOJAI Cloud deploy service (port 4380). The deploy target for `npx hojai deploy --mode=remote`. Push projects, list deployments, tear down — the wildcard *.hojai.app routing layer.

sdks.name: @hojai/cloud-sdk
sdks.description: HOJAI Cloud SDK - Unified SDK for all HOJAI Cloud services

sdks.name: @hojai/commerce
sdks.description: Commerce SDK - Client for the RABTUL commerce ecosystem. Wraps 9 rez-* services (wallet, payment, catalog, booking, cashback, gift-card, invoice, bill-payments, loyalty) into a single ergonomic client.

sdks.name: @hojai/copilots
sdks.description: Copilots SDK - Client for the 7 HOJAI department copilots (agent, business, executive, finance, marketing, sales, support). One sub-client per copilot, ~50 methods total.

sdks.name: @hojai/department
sdks.description: Department OS SDK - Client for the 9 horizontal Department OS services of RTMN (Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Procurement, Workforce, Finance, Operations, CXO, Revenue Intelligence). Pairs with @hojai/industry to cover the 8 horizonta

sdks.name: @hojai/genie
sdks.description: Genie SDK - Client for HOJAI Genie personal AI assistant platform. Wraps 23 Genie services (gateway + memory + briefing + calendar + search + voice + companion + assistant + lifestyle + serendipity) into a single ergonomic TypeScript client

sdks.name: @hojai/industry
sdks.description: Industry OS SDK - Client for the 24 (now 26) vertical Industry OS services of RTMN. Wraps Restaurant, Hotel, Healthcare, Retail, Legal, Education, Agriculture, Automotive, Beauty, Fashion, Fitness, Gaming, Government, Home Services, Manufac

sdks.name: @hojai/intelligence-sdk
sdks.description: Unified SDK for HOJAI Intelligence services

sdks.name: @hojai/marketplace
sdks.description: BAM Marketplace SDK - Client for the BLR AI Marketplace (BAM). Wraps 8 backend services (listings, reviews, discovery, exploration, evaluation, reputation, ROI, founder, twins) into a single ergonomic client.

sdks.name: @hojai/media
sdks.description: Media SDK - Client for HOJAI Media OS (content + streaming + creator + channels + playlists + live + comments).

sdks.name: @hojai/memory
sdks.description: Memory SDK - Client for the HOJAI Memory Layer (MemoryOS, memory-network, memory-confidence, twin-memory-bridge, memory-context-engine).

sdks.name: @hojai/nexha
sdks.description: Nexha SDK - Client for the Nexha federation network. Wraps 12+ nexha-* services (business-directory, supplier, distribution, warehouse, pricing, trade-finance, commerce, mission, partner, acp-messaging, hooks, provisioning, tenant) into a s

sdks.name: @hojai/payment
sdks.description: Unified Payment SDK for the HOJAI AI / RABTUL ecosystem. Wraps rez-payment, rez-bill-payments, REZ-sepa, REZ-payment-gateway, settlement aggregation, and webhook management into a single ergonomic client.

sdks.name: @hojai/razor
sdks.description: Razor SDK - Client for the HOJAI RAZO Keyboard Communication OS (port 4725). Wraps the intent router, multi-channel messaging (WhatsApp/Telegram/SMS/email), and conversation sessions.

sdks.name: @hojai/reputation
sdks.description: Reputation SDK - Client for HOJAI trust + reputation (SADA, agent-reputation, dispute resolution, leaderboard, network graph, risk scoring).

sdks.name: @hojai/skills
sdks.description: Skills SDK - Client for HOJAI SkillOS + Skill Marketplace + Prompt Manager + Workflow Marketplace + Translation OS.

sdks.name: @hojai/sutar
sdks.description: SUTAR SDK - Client for the SUTAR agent runtime. Wraps 15+ SUTAR services (merchant-agents, agent-orchestration, agent-contracts, agent-learning, ACP, etc.) into a single ergonomic client.

sdks.name: @hojai/twin
sdks.description: Twin SDK - Client for HOJAI TwinOS: the central Hub + 4 specialized twins (customer, order, employee, voice).

sdks.name: @hojai/whatsapp
sdks.description: WhatsApp SDK - Client for the HOJAI WhatsApp OS (port 4860). 360dialog / Twilio / Meta Cloud API provider switching, template management, contact CRM, and messaging.

sdks.name: @hojai/widget-core
sdks.description: HOJAI Widget Core — 5KB vanilla JS that turns any website into an AI front office powered by SUTAR agents.

sdks.name: @hojai/widget-react
sdks.description: React wrapper for the HOJAI Widget.
